title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0624
summary: Upendra Singh was initially granted bail in a case under IPC Sections 419, 420 and Section 66-C of the IT Act. After further investigation, additional serious charges under IPC Sections 467, 468, 471, 120B and Sections 66/66D of the IT Act were added, leading to a new bail application after the l...
